text: Surrounded by glass, neon, and the bright clarity of modern design, I feel simultaneously out of place and at home. There is an odd tranquility to the ordered emptiness, the anticipation of thought yet unspoken. Entering this vibrant R+D space, I sense the boundaries between past and future, artifact and idea, blurring. I am enveloped in a sense of curiosity—a museum-like reverence mixed with the energy of living inquiry. My mind stirs with questions about purpose and connection, aware of being both an observer and a participant in humanity's endless research into itself.
